violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food Eggs was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food *. Eggs must be stored below Raw meat in fridge.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor needs a deep cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor is due for deep cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
